hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/--no-verify/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: --no-verify flag detected. Git hooks should not be bypassed.');process.exit(2)}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Block git hook-bypass flag (--no-verify) to protect pre-commit and pre-push hooks

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const c=i.tool_input?.content||'';const lines=c.split('\n').length;if(lines>800){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: File exceeds 800 lines ('+lines+' lines)');console.error('[Hook] Split into smaller, focused modules');process.exit(2)}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Block creation of files larger than 800 lines

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const ns=i.tool_input?.new_string||'';if(/TODO|FIXME|HACK/.test(ns)){console.error('[Hook] Warning: New TODO/FIXME/HACK comment added - consider creating an issue')}console.log(d)})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const ns=i.tool_input?.new_string||'';if(/console\.log/.test(ns)){console.error('[Hook] Warning: console.log detected in edit - remove before committing')}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Warn about console.log statements after edits

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/src\/.*\.(ts|js|py)$/.test(p)&&!/\.test\.|\.spec\.|\_test\./.test(p)){const testExts=['.test.ts','.test.js','.spec.ts','.spec.js','_test.py'];const hasTest=testExts.some(ext=>{const tp=p.replace(/\.(ts|js|py)$/,ext);return fs.existsSync(tp)});if(!hasTest){console.error('[Hook] No test file found for: '+p);console.error('[Hook] Consider writing tests first (/tdd)')}}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Remind to create tests when adding new source files

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const files=execSync('git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim().split('\n').filter(Boolean);let found=false;for(const f of files){try{const content=require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(/console\.log/.test(content)&&/\.(ts|js|tsx|jsx)$/.test(f)){console.error('[Hook] console.log found in: '+f);found=true}}catch(e){}}if(found){console.error('[Hook] Remove console.log statements before committing')}}catch(e){}console.log(d)})"

Stop.description: Check for console.log in modified files after each response
